programme.title: Kings from Queens: The Run DMC Story

programme.title: Kings from Queens: The Run DMC Story

programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders find good things really do come in small packages when they take down a modest bank barn in Punxsutawney, PA, and come away with more lumber than expected; Mark tours an 1800s feed mill with most of its machinery intact.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders

programme.title: Mini Reni
programme.desc: With her youngest child, Crew, moving to the big kids' room, Joanna expands her kitchen into Crew's old bedroom and creates the butler's pantry of her dreams.

programme.title: Mini Reni
programme.desc: Joanna jumps at the chance to design and transform her parents' outdoor patio into a reimagined and multifunctional glass-enclosed space; her dad plans to pot plants and both parents can enjoy gathering with friends and family around a fire.

programme.title: Mini Reni
programme.desc: Joanna takes on the challenge of turning two small spaces into key parts of a busy and creative home; with moody paint color, nostalgic wallpaper and charming details, Jo creates an inviting mudroom and a cozy, inspiring art studio.

programme.title: Mini Reni
programme.desc: Joanna renovates two connected plain box rooms into his and hers home offices that reflect a young couple's personalities; blending old-world character and simple elegance, Jo designs spaces that feel moody yet masculine and French-inspired.

programme.title: Mini Reni
programme.desc: Joanna revives a primary bath and connecting sunroom with a classic design and a color palette that feels original to the old home, adding baseboards, clay tiles with vintage tones and a space-saving vanity.

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: A couple narrow down their search to three homes that would work for their family of five, and task Chip and Jo with determining which house has the most renovation potential for their budget.

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: Chip and Joanna take on a historical project for Courtney and Joey Scrivano, who are ready to upgrade from their modest loft to a house where they can raise their new baby; the 1927 Tudor home is outdated and lacks a true master suite.

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: After looking at houses for months with no luck, Gayle and Tim Jackson need help to find a new place for their family of four that has four bedrooms and three bathrooms that, ideally, can be renovated within their budget.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: A beach-loving couple from Washington are hoping to reconnect with the ocean; they're looking for a home in Newport or Seal Rock, Oregon but many of the properties in their price range require remodeling, so it's important they find a great deal.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: A Michigan couple, with the help of their 17 and 20-year-old sons, use their previous experience renovating houses to completely transform a Panama City Beach, Fla., home into the beach retreat of their dreams.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: A woman from Austin, Texas, who's vacationed in Rockport with her husband and two boys, is ready to find a vacation retreat for the family. She's seeking an affordable property they can personalize to enjoy themselves but also rent out.

programme.desc: Two brothers and their mother team up to find a rundown beach house they can renovate and sell along the coast of Gulf Shores, Ala.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: A Massachusetts couple that started a business rehabbing classic and rundown homes to resell to new families, finds an outdated beach home to renovate along the state's beautiful and historic south shore.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: A couple from Dallas searches for a rentable vacation property in Surfside Beach, Texas; they're working under a tight timeline because they hope to renovate the property before their extended family arrives from India.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: A couple partners with their adult daughter to look for an outdated home along Barnegat Bay, N.J., that they can work on themselves to transform into a beach getaway to enjoy with the rest of their family.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: A first-time homebuyer has moved back to northeast Ohio to be closer to his family; he's searching for an affordable property that he can renovate into his forever lakeside retreat.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: A Hudson Valley couple, looking for a deal on a waterfront vacation spot for their whole family only a few hours from them in the Finger Lakes of New York, will need to renovate an outdated home to get themselves the lakeside retreat of their dreams.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: After years of hard work, a real estate agent uses the fruits of her labor to purchase an investment property that can be flipped for dual purposes; a new home for her daughter that will one day transition into an excellent rental property.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: A decades long friendship explores uncharted waters when an agent helps her longtime friend buy and renovate a lake home; they've made countless memories on Lake Hartwell, so it's only fitting that's where he's looking to find his forever home.
